name: Ancient Ark — Shee Generation Ship
description: Multi-biome generation ship sprites for the Precursors game. The Ark is the central command infrastructure of the Shee generation ship, housing six decks: Observatory, Bridge, Terrarium, Laboratory, Engineering, and Cargo Hold.

shee_ark.png.description: Primary hull sprite — dormant state (game start default). Whale-like cylindrical bio-mechanical hull with transparent biome domes showing green terrarium, blue-violet energy veins tracing structural lines, bioluminescent fungal overgrowth at hull seams. Dormant: faint veins, heavy fungi, foggy domes.
shee_ark.png.usage: Loaded as 'shee_ark' texture in GameScene.ts, rendered by ShipSprite.ts

shee_ark_buried.png.description: Dormant/buried variant — same as shee_ark.png. Ancient ship partially overgrown with fungal growth in Fungal Grotto biome.

shee_ark_launch.png.description: Launch-ready variant — ship fully powered up with bright blue-violet energy veins, orange-amber engine exhaust glow at stern, clearer biome domes, brighter hull. Use when ship awakens (Tier 25+).

shee_ark_crosssection.png.description: Interior cross-section showing all 6 decks: Observatory (top), Bridge, Terrarium, Laboratory, Engineering, Cargo Hold (bottom). Reference/UI asset for discovery arc.

shee_ark_v2.png.description: v2 dormant hull — master copy. Same as shee_ark.png.

shee_ark_v2_launch.png.description: v2 awakened hull — master copy. Same as shee_ark_launch.png.

shee_ark_v2_buried.png.description: v2 dormant buried — master copy. Same as shee_ark_buried.png.

art_style: Pixel art, selective outline, detailed shading, organic bio-mechanical aesthetic
